# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    system {
        name "undefined-references"
    }
    policy-options {
        policy-statement "export-system" {
            entry 10 {
                from {
                    prefix-list ["missing-pfx"]
                }
                action {
                    action-type accept
                }
            }
        }
    }
    router "Base" {
        autonomous-system 65001
        bgp {
            neighbor "10.0.0.1" {
                group "missing-group"
            }
        }
    }
}
